entities.name: WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The development and management of watersheds to improve productivity, natural resources, and livelihoods

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The primary country of focus for watershed development and management

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output improved through watershed management

entities.name: LIVESTOCK PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of livestock output improved through watershed management

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The sustainable management of natural resources within a watershed

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The enhancement of rural livelihoods in marginal and resource-poor regions

entities.name: INDIAN COUNCIL FOR AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: An institution collaborating on watershed management research

entities.name: CONSULTATIVE GROUP FOR INTERNATIONAL AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: An international organization collaborating on watershed management research

entities.name: NEW DELHI
entities.description: The city where the international workshop on watershed management was held

entities.name: DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE & COOPERATION
entities.description: The government department that sponsored the volume on watershed management

entities.name: MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The government ministry that sponsored the volume on watershed management

entities.name: GOVERNMENT OF INDIA
entities.description: The national government that sponsored the volume on watershed management
